mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tb_temp_tag ( temp_id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, tag_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, address VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, plc_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, col_name VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL, enabled TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UNIQUE KEY uk_temp_tag (plc_id, address), UNIQUE KEY uk_temp_col (col_name) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'tb_temp_tag' AND column_name = #{colName}
mapper.update: ALTER TABLE tb_temp_tag ADD COLUMN col_name VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''
ALTER TABLE tb_temp_tag ADD COLUMN equip_id VARCHAR(20) NULL DEFAULT NULL

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tb_temp_history ( history_id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, temp_id INT NOT NULL, temp_name VARCHAR(100), address VARCHAR(50), plc_id VARCHAR(50), temp_value DOUBLE, record_time DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INDEX idx_temp_record (record_time), INDEX idx_temp_id (temp_id) )
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tb_temp_snapshot ( snapshot_id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, record_time DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, INDEX idx_snap_time (record_time) )
ALTER TABLE tb_temp_snapshot ADD COLUMN `${colName}` DOUBLE NULL DEFAULT NULL
mapper.select: SELECT temp_id, tag_name, address, plc_id, col_name, trend_name, equip_id, enabled, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM tb_temp_tag ORDER BY temp_id ASC

SELECT temp_id, tag_name, address, plc_id, col_name, trend_name, equip_id, enabled, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM tb_temp_tag WHERE temp_id = #{tempId} LIMIT 1

SELECT temp_id, tag_name, address, plc_id, col_name, trend_name, equip_id, enabled, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM tb_temp_tag WHERE col_name IS NULL OR col_name = ''
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_temp_tag (tag_name, address, plc_id, col_name, equip_id, enabled) VALUES (#{tagName}, #{address}, #{plcId}, #{colName}, #{equipId}, #{enabled}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tag_name = VALUES(tag_name), col_name = VALUES(col_name), equip_id = VALUES(equip_id), enabled = VALUES(enabled)
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_temp_tag SET tag_name = #{tagName}, address = #{address}, plc_id = #{plcId}, col_name = #{colName}, equip_id = #{equipId}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE temp_id = #{tempId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'tb_temp_snapshot' AND column_name = #{colName}
mapper.update: ALTER TABLE tb_temp_snapshot CHANGE COLUMN `${oldCol}` `${newCol}` DOUBLE
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_temp_snapshot ORDER BY record_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM tb_temp_snapshot WHERE record_time BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} ORDER BY record_time ASC
SELECT tc_cnt, tc_regtime, tc_name, tc_desc, tc_user_code, tc_user_name, tc_yn FROM tb_temp_memo WHERE tc_yn = 'Y' AND tc_regtime BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} ORDER BY tc_regtime ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_temp_memo (tc_regtime, tc_name, tc_desc, tc_user_code, tc_user_name, tc_yn) VALUES (#{tcRegtime}, #{tcName}, #{tcDesc}, #{tcUserCode}, #{tcUserName}, 'Y')
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_temp_memo SET tc_yn = 'N' WHERE tc_cnt = #{value}
